ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "script_path" TEXT /* Path to the script file of the application */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the application was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the application was last updated */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of the application (e.g., face recognition, outlier detection) */,
  "app_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the application (e.g., deep learning, machine learning) */,
  "app_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, execution time) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the model version is associated with */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes or improvements in the model version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model version was created */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "model_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the model (e.g., convolutional neural network, random forest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt value for password encryption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the data source is associated with */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_path" TEXT /* Path to the data source file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was created */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., image, text, audio) */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data source */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes or improvements in the application version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the application version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the application version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* List of changes made in the application version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the application */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_access_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance log event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the log is associated with */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was recorded */,
  "log_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric at the time of logging */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is associated with */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference is associated with */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., language, timezone) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_tags_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
